signals.raw:
Cavaliers Take 2-0 Series Lead | Series Momentum Confirmed | HIGH confidence**

The **Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2**[1][3], securing a 2-0 series lead in their first-round matchup.
